failure_codes.E_SCHEMA_WRONG_TYPE: A field has the wrong JSON type or enum value.
failure_codes.E_SCHEMA_UNKNOWN_EVENT: The event type is not registered in the catalog.
failure_codes.E_SCHEMA_UNKNOWN_FIELD: A closed object contains an unknown property.
failure_codes.E_SCHEMA_OVERSIZE: Raw or canonical UTF-8 JSON exceeds 1048576 bytes.
failure_codes.E_SCHEMA_INVALID_ID: An identifier or scope identifier relationship is invalid.
failure_codes.E_SCHEMA_INLINE_BASE64: Media bytes, base64, or a data URI appears in JSON.
failure_codes.E_ROUNDTRIP_UNICODE_LOSS: A cross-language round trip changed string content.
failure_codes.E_GEN_DRIFT: Generated source differs from the deterministic projection.
failure_codes.E_FUZZ_ACCEPTED_INVALID: A deterministic mutation expected to fail was accepted.
failure_codes.E_FUZZ_REJECTED_VALID: A deterministic valid case was rejected.
failure_codes.E_FUZZ_RUNTIME_CRASH: A validator crashed instead of returning a result.
failure_codes.E_XLANG_ROUNDTRIP_MISMATCH: Python and TypeScript produced different canonical values.
failure_codes.E_COMPAT_N_MINUS_1_UNSPECIFIED: The compatibility policy does not explicitly address n-1.
failure_codes.E_GATE_20_RUN_FAIL: At least one of twenty consecutive full runs failed.
failure_codes.E_PERF_P95_BUDGET: Local runtime validation p95 exceeded 5 ms.

cases: remove each required envelope field independently
replace each scalar with an incompatible JSON type
turn scope without sessionId or turnId
raw UTF-8 JSON at or below 1048576 bytes
validator never throws on JSON-compatible input
validation benchmark reports p50 p95 and max

stop_conditions: Unknown event or field is accepted.
Any Unicode or cross-language data loss occurs.
Any of twenty deterministic runs fails.
Validation p95 exceeds 5 ms without an accepted ADR.
required_commands: uv run --frozen python -m unittest discover -s tests/contracts -p test_*.py
